content.full_text:
February 3, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street  
Sacramento, Ca 95814  
Attn: Lynda Cassady

Dear Ms. Cassady,

This will confirm our conversation by telephone today wherein we discussed the transfer of funds from one campaign to elect "X" for School Board to another campaign which is intended to recall "Y" from the City Council.

Your ruling was that as long as this was not a special election to fill a vacant office and the jurisdiction does not have contribution limits, there would be no rule forbidding the transfer of said funds in any amount.

You also stated that if I would write a letter to you, you would confirm the above direction given to me and would return my letter with your confirmation. An envelope is enclosed to expedite this return of information.

Thank you for your help in this matter.

Yours truly,

Dorothy Benya

DB:dd  
encl.
